text: Indonesia 2nd NDC (Oct 2025) — first economy-wide absolute target: 1.35–1.49 GtCO2e by 2030
Blue Carbon Ecosystems Roadmap & RENAKSI 2025–2030 launched at COP30 — covers 3.45M ha mangroves + 660K ha seagrass
IDXCarbon: 1.60 MtCO2e traded since 2023; international tier live since Jan 2025
Indonesia–Japan JCM MRA (Oct 2024): SPE-GRK ↔ JCM credit equivalence operational
Indonesia–South Korea MoU (Jun 2024) under IPEF for Article 6 cooperation
Indonesia restoration target: 600K ha mangrove rehab — 22% of total mangrove emission reduction potential
NDC financing gap widens — USD 472.6B needed for 2030–2035 (vs $247B in BUR2 for 2018–2030)
